statements.statement: I can share simple hopes for tomorrow and name one thing I will do.
I can describe positive goals for myself and explain the steps I need to take.
I can articulate detailed future visions and create realistic action plans with timelines and milestones.
I can construct comprehensive future scenarios and justify strategic pathways while adapting plans based on changing circumstances.
I can help two people find a simple solution when they disagree about something.
I can guide small groups through basic negotiation steps to reach fair compromises.
I can facilitate structured negotiations between multiple parties to address their underlying interests.
I can independently mediate complex multi-stakeholder negotiations to achieve sustainable workable compromises.
I can share my thoughts about what is right and wrong with teacher support.
I can discuss different ethical values and explain why they matter in everyday situations.
I can engage in reasoned discussion about competing ethical values in complex real-world scenarios.
I can facilitate sophisticated ethical discussions by analysing multiple perspectives and justifying value-based positions across diverse contexts.
I can identify simple problems in my community with teacher guidance.
I can research basic social justice challenges and suggest simple solutions.
I can investigate complex social justice issues and develop detailed actionable plans.
I can systematically research multifaceted social justice challenges and create comprehensive strategic plans.
I can name simple values that help me make good choices with adult support.
I can describe the main principles that guide my decisions in familiar situations.
I can explain my core values and how they influence my choices across different contexts.
I can articulate my guiding principles with clear reasoning and justify their application in complex situations.
I can write simple sentences about what I want to be when I grow up.
I can write a personal statement describing my goals for learning and helping others.
I can write a detailed personal statement explaining my aspirations for personal growth and community contribution.
I can write a comprehensive personal statement articulating my aspirations for identity development and meaningful societal impact.
